MELItem.Title: Lavatory Waste Compartment Fire Extinguishing Systems

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Number installed: 10 - Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871, VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879.
Number installed: 9 - Applicable to: VN-A865, VN-A866, VN-A869.
May be inoperative for each lavatory provided associated lavatory smoke detection system operates normally.

OperationProcedure.Para: If a lavatory fire occurs, extinguish the fire with a portable fire extinguisher.

DispatchConditionRemarks.Para: Number installed: 10 - Applicable to: VN-A861, VN-A862, VN-A863, VN-A864, VN-A867, VN-A868, VN-A870, VN-A871, VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874,VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879.
Number installed: 9 - Applicable to: VN-A865, VN-A866, VN-A869.
May be inoperative for each lavatory provided associated:

ListItem.Para: Lavatory door is locked closed and placarded, INOPERATIVE - DO NOT ENTER.
Lavatory is used only by crew members.

Note.Para: These provisions are not intended to prohibit lavatory use or inspections by crew members.

ListItem.Para: Confirm the lavatory waste container is empty.
Close, lock and placard the lavatory door.

OperationProcedure.Para: Lavatory door should remain locked closed, except for use or inspection by crew members.
